data.name: Wet City
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Wet City – Your Chance to Start a New Life!

Wet City is a place where anyone can fulfill their dreams if they are willing to take risks. You begin your journey as an aspiring producer, and your goal is to build a career, achieve success, and outshine your competitors.

What is the Game About?

Wet City is a life simulator where you manage the career of a producer, creating and selling films. There are no easy paths: every mistake can cost you your reputation, money, or even your freedom. Buy equipment, negotiate with the mafia, avoid the police, expand your studio, and become famous.

What Awaits You in Wet City?

  • Create films with unique content: The game features over 60 animations you can use in your films to captivate your audience.

  • Produce exclusive materials: A vast collection of photos and additional content will help you stand out from the competition.

  • Expand your studio: Purchase new equipment, improve the quality of your work, and unlock new creative possibilities.

  • Evade the police: The more successful you become, the more attention you attract. Avoid fines, destroy evidence, or pay the mafia for protection.

  • Work with the mafia: Only dark connections can solve your problems quickly and discreetly. But remember: every service comes at a price.

  • Sell your films: Negotiate with buyers, set prices for your projects, and decide what’s more important—money or reputation.

  • Gain popularity: The more films you create, the more fans you attract. Climb to the top and become a legend.

Game Features

  • Over 60 animations to make every project unique.

  • A wide range of equipment, scenarios, and materials for your films.

  • An interactive city with various locations: a tech store, a bar, a pawn shop, the mafia, and more.

  • The opportunity to grow from a novice to an industry star.

Your Path to Success

Wet City is a world where you decide your path:

  • A successful producer known to everyone.

  • Or a risk-taker who bets everything to achieve their goals.

  • Wet City Awaits You

Every scene, every frame, every step is a part of your story. Discover all the secrets of this city, unleash your potential, and become a leader in the industry.

data.short_description: Welcome to Wet City – the city of sin and opportunity, where you rise as an adult film producer. Meet the hottest girls, uncover their secrets, and build your very own entertainment empire. Money, romance, danger—it's all waiting for you!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i3 или AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 4000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050
  • 儲存空間: 10000 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i5 или AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 8000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1060

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 High Sierra или новее
  • 處理器: Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: M1 GPU
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: M2 GPU
